source.title: App Intelligence: pinduoduo (拼多多) - Ratings & Rankings

extractions.claim: pinduoduo iOS App Store rating in CN
extractions.evidence: Rating: 2.9/5. (3,383,826 ratings). Current version: 2.9/5. Version: 8.0.0. Price: 免费

extractions.claim: Qimai (七麦数据) coverage for pinduoduo
extractions.evidence: Qimai (qimai.cn) tracks pinduoduo across 155 countries and 9 Chinese Android stores (Huawei, Xiaomi, OPPO, Vivo, Tencent MyApp, etc.). Free tier shows: current ranking, rating trend, category rank history. Paid tier adds: download estimates, DAU/MAU, revenue estimates, keyword rankings. For Chinese domestic rankings (critical for Pinduoduo), Qimai is the primary source since Google Play is not available in China. URL: https://www.qimai.cn/app/rank/index/brand/free/device/iphone/country/cn/genre/6024 (Shopping category, China, iPhone, Free)

verification.verifier_notes: Qimai full API requires paid subscription. iTunes Lookup used as free alternative for iOS data.
